explanation: This command bypasses the 'selection_base' criteria of the Sigma rule. The rule looks for the exact string ' net use http', so using 'https' evades it. Additionally, the rule strictly looks for '& start /b ', so simply omitting the '/b' switch (or adding extra spaces) will break the 'contains|all' condition.

This command bypasses the 'selection_img' criteria. The rule is specifically scoped to look only at 'cmd.exe' (or 'Cmd.EXE'). By utilizing powershell.exe to execute the mounting and the payload execution, the entire detection logic is bypassed.
